message:
fix(dolt-archive): replace mapfile with while-read for bash 3.2 compat

macOS ships bash 3.2 which lacks mapfile (bash 4.0+). The pruning
step failed on every archive cycle. Export succeeded but old snapshots
never got cleaned up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -118,7 +118,10 @@ done
 
 # Prune old exports (keep last 24 snapshots per DB)
 for DB in "${PROD_DBS[@]}"; do
-  mapfile -t ALL_SNAPS < <(ls -t "$JSONL_EXPORT_DIR/${DB}-2"*.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true)
+  ALL_SNAPS=()
+  while IFS= read -r f; do
+    ALL_SNAPS+=("$f")
+  done < <(ls -t "$JSONL_EXPORT_DIR/${DB}-2"*.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true)
   if (( ${#ALL_SNAPS[@]} > 24 )); then
     printf '%s\n' "${ALL_SNAPS[@]:24}" | xargs rm -f
     log "Pruned old $DB snapshots"
